metadata.description: Central registry for agent plugins (MCPs, skills, commands, hooks).

plugins.name: agent-vdesktop
plugins.description: Microsoft Virtual Desktop management for Claude Code (native Windows + WSL). Create/delete/switch desktops, apply layouts (presets and custom percent splits, multi-monitor), launch Chrome/Terminal/VSCode into layout slots, pin apps across desktops.

plugins.name: agent-project-issues
plugins.description: MCP server for GitHub/GitLab issue management. Read/create/update tickets and add comments with automatic safety markers (ai-generated / ai-modified labels, #ai-generated comment prefix). Per-project permissions; falls back to read-only auto-discovery from the git remote when no config is present.

plugins.name: agent-vdesktop-skill
plugins.description: Skill teaching Claude how to drive the agent-vdesktop MCP server: create/manage Windows Virtual Desktops, apply layouts (presets and custom percent splits, multi-monitor), launch Chrome / Windows Terminal / VS Code into layout slots, pin apps across desktops.

plugins.name: agent-worktree
plugins.description: MCP server for git worktree lifecycle management. Create/list/remove worktrees with branch handling, run per-project setup scripts on creation, and detect uncommitted changes before destructive operations.

plugins.name: agent-python-developer-ticket-workflow
plugins.description: Turns agent-project-issues tickets into draft pull requests for Python projects. Ships two skills — orchestrate-tickets (dispatches conflict-free parallel ticket work across git worktrees and launches one background Claude session per ticket) and process-ticket (an end-to-end context→plan→code→review→PR pipeline) — backed by five subagents. Drives the agent-project-issues and agent-worktree MCPs.
